title.zh: ASML上调2026年收入和毛利率指引，AI芯片周期继续推高先进制程设备稀缺性
title.en: ASML raises 2026 revenue and margin guidance as the AI chip cycle tightens advanced-tool scarcity

summary.zh: MarketWatch报道，ASML在强劲二季度后把2026年收入指引上调至430亿至450亿欧元，并提高毛利率预期。作为EUV光刻设备唯一供应商，ASML的扩产节奏直接影响TSMC、Samsung、Intel等先进制程客户。行业信号是，AI芯片需求并没有只停留在GPU公司财报里，而是在向上游设备、产能排队和议价能力传导。下一步要看2027与2028年EUV、High-NA设备交付能力是否成为先进芯片扩张瓶颈。
summary.en: MarketWatch reports that ASML raised its 2026 revenue guidance to €43bn-€45bn and lifted its gross-margin outlook after a strong second quarter. As the sole supplier of EUV lithography systems, ASML's capacity path directly affects advanced-node customers such as TSMC, Samsung, and Intel. The signal is that AI-chip demand is not confined to GPU earnings; it is propagating upstream into equipment scarcity, production queues, and pricing power. Watch whether 2027 and 2028 EUV and High-NA deliveries become the limiting factor for advanced-chip expansion.

watch.zh: 关注ASML扩产是否能跟上先进封装、HBM和逻辑芯片需求，以及中国订单变化是否影响长期产能配置。
watch.en: Watch whether ASML capacity can keep pace with advanced packaging, HBM, and logic demand, and whether China-order shifts affect long-term capacity allocation.

liveUpdates.reference: MarketWatch, ASML beat-and-raise quarter and capacity expansion, published 2026-07-16

title.zh: Google在印度推出AI教育与开发者计划，AI人才培养正在从工具培训走向生态绑定
title.en: Google launches AI education and developer programmes in India as talent building becomes ecosystem strategy

summary.zh: Times of India报道，Google在I/O Connect India 2026推出面向开发者、初创企业和企业的AI工具、教育课程与安全合作，并强调数据本地化与负责任AI。教育科技的重点正在从单个AI学习产品转向平台生态：云服务、模型工具、课程、创业支持和合规框架被打包在一起。对印度市场而言，AI教育不只是培训学生使用工具，而是争夺下一代开发者入口和企业采用路径。
summary.en: The Times of India reports that Google used I/O Connect India 2026 to launch AI tools, education programmes, safety partnerships, and developer support for startups and enterprises, while emphasising data localisation and responsible AI. Edtech is moving from single AI learning products toward platform ecosystems in which cloud services, model tools, curricula, startup support, and compliance frameworks are bundled. For India, AI education is not only training students to use tools; it is a contest for the next generation of developers and enterprise adoption pathways.

watch.zh: 关注印度高校、政府培训项目和企业云采购是否形成闭环，以及本地数据要求是否促使更多AI基础设施落地印度。
watch.en: Watch whether Indian universities, public training schemes, and enterprise cloud procurement form a closed loop, and whether data-localisation requirements pull more AI infrastructure into India.

liveUpdates.reference: Times of India, Google I/O Connect India 2026 AI education programmes, published 2026-07-15

referenceLinks.label: Times of India: Google AI education push in India

title.zh: 电竞世界杯迁至巴黎，游戏赛事正从娱乐产品变成国家级软实力和资本项目
title.en: The Esports World Cup moves to Paris as gaming events become soft-power and capital projects

summary.zh: Le Monde报道，2026年电竞世界杯因中东冲突迁至巴黎，约2000名选手参加24个项目，总奖金接近7500万美元，背后仍由沙特资本承担主要组织成本。这个事件说明，电竞已经不只是游戏发行的营销渠道，而是旅游、城市品牌、主权基金、青年文化和地缘政治叙事的交叉平台。对游戏产业而言，未来增长越来越依赖赛事版权、场馆运营、政府合作和国际舆论风险管理。
summary.en: Le Monde reports that the 2026 Esports World Cup has been relocated to Paris because of Middle East conflict, with about 2,000 players across 24 titles and nearly $75m in prize money, while Saudi-linked capital remains central to organisation costs. The event shows that esports is no longer merely a marketing channel for game publishers; it is a platform connecting tourism, city branding, sovereign capital, youth culture, and geopolitical narrative. Future gaming growth will increasingly depend on event rights, venue operations, government cooperation, and international-reputation risk management.

watch.zh: 关注法国本地游戏产业是否真正受益，以及主权资本主导的大型赛事是否会推动电竞治理、赞助披露和人权审查规则。
watch.en: Watch whether France's local game industry actually benefits, and whether sovereign-capital-led events push stronger esports governance, sponsorship disclosure, and human-rights review rules.

liveUpdates.reference: Le Monde, EWC 2026 in Paris and France-Saudi esports partnership, published 2026-07-09

referenceLinks.label: Le Monde: Esports World Cup 2026 in Paris

title.zh: UHPC与高强钢疲劳模拟正在从逐周循环计算走向加速断裂框架
title.en: UHPC and high-strength-steel fatigue simulation is moving from cycle-by-cycle analysis toward accelerated fracture frameworks

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2026年预印本；内容：用加速PF-CZM框架模拟UHPC和HSS的混合断裂与高周疲劳。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2026 preprint using an accelerated phase-field cohesive-zone framework to simulate mixed-mode fracture and high-cycle fatigue in UHPC and HSS.

summary.zh: 高性能材料正在进入桥梁、风电基础、轨道和工业结构，但疲劳行为往往仍依赖昂贵试验和保守经验曲线。这项研究把UHPC与高强钢的断裂和高周疲劳放进PF-CZM框架，并用包络荷载和自适应循环增量减少逐周循环计算成本。对结构工程师的意义是，未来疲劳评估可能不再只查S-N曲线，而会结合裂纹驱动力、材料本构和数字孪生更新。局限是数值模型仍需要大量试验校准，工程应用前必须证明对焊接细节、施工缺陷和环境退化的泛化能力。
summary.en: High-performance materials are entering bridges, wind foundations, rail assets, and industrial structures, but their fatigue behaviour still often relies on costly tests and conservative empirical curves. This study places fracture and high-cycle fatigue of UHPC and high-strength steel within a PF-CZM framework, using envelope loading and adaptive cycle increments to reduce the cost of cycle-by-cycle simulation. For structural engineers, fatigue assessment may shift from simply selecting S-N curves toward combining crack-driving force, material constitutive behaviour, and digital-twin updating. The limitation is that numerical models still require substantial experimental calibration, and practical use must prove generalisation across welded details, construction defects, and environmental degradation.

caveat.zh: 该方法适合作为研究和高价值构件评估工具，短期不应脱离规范疲劳细节分类独立使用。
caveat.en: The method is suited to research and high-value component assessment, but should not yet be used independently of code fatigue-detail classifications.

insights.reference: Li et al., High performance construction materials fracture and high cycle fatigue assessment based on accelerated PF-CZM, arXiv:2606.23468

referenceLinks.label: arXiv: Accelerated PF-CZM for UHPC and HSS fatigue

title.zh: 桥梁冲刷风险提醒结构工程师：基础安全不能只看承载力，还要看河床会不会消失
title.en: Bridge scour risk reminds structural engineers that foundation safety is not only bearing capacity, but whether the riverbed remains

evidence.zh: 资料类型：FHWA/USGS等公开技术资料；内容：冲刷被长期列为桥梁失效的重要水力因素，评估需考虑收缩冲刷、局部冲刷和长期河床演变。
evidence.en: Evidence: public FHWA/USGS technical material identifying scour as a major hydraulic contributor to bridge failure, requiring assessment of contraction scour, local scour, and long-term bed change.

summary.zh: 桥梁基础设计常被结构专业简化为桩承载力和墩台稳定，但洪水条件下真正危险的是基础周围河床被局部或整体冲走。冲刷风险受流速、桥孔收缩、墩形、漂浮物、河床材料、河道迁移和洪水历程共同控制。对结构工程师的启发是，桥梁可靠度不能只建立在静态地勘剖面上，必须和水文、地貌、检查维护和封桥预案相连。未来气候变化增加极端降雨后，既有桥梁的冲刷筛查、监测和优先维修会成为基础设施运维的重要能力。局限是经验公式受试验条件影响大，现场校准和洪后检查仍不可替代。
summary.en: Bridge-foundation design is often simplified by structural teams into pile capacity and pier stability, but during floods the critical danger can be the local or general removal of the bed around foundations. Scour is governed by velocity, bridge opening contraction, pier shape, debris, bed material, channel migration, and flood history. The lesson is that bridge reliability cannot rest on a static geotechnical profile alone; it must connect hydrology, geomorphology, inspection, maintenance, and closure planning. As climate change increases extreme rainfall, scour screening, monitoring, and repair prioritisation for existing bridges will become a core infrastructure-management capability. The limitation is that empirical equations are sensitive to test conditions, so field calibration and post-flood inspection remain essential.

caveat.zh: 冲刷评估应由水文、水力、地质和结构专业联合完成，不能只由结构计算软件内部假设替代。
caveat.en: Scour assessment should be shared by hydrology, hydraulics, geology, and structural teams, not replaced by assumptions embedded in structural software.

insights.reference: FHWA HEC-18 and USGS bridge scour technical material

referenceLinks.label: FHWA: Evaluating Scour at Bridges, HEC-18
USGS: Stream stability and scour assessment at bridges

title.zh: 基础设施气候适应的瓶颈不只是技术，而是长期收益和短期资本之间的错配
title.en: The bottleneck in infrastructure climate adaptation is not only technical, but the mismatch between long-term benefit and short-term capital

evidence.zh: 研究类型：2025年预印本；内容：提出用综合碳市场为城市基础设施气候适应筹集资金。
evidence.en: Evidence: 2025 preprint proposing integrated carbon markets as a financing mechanism for urban infrastructure climate adaptation.

summary.zh: 很多城市知道需要加固排水、桥梁、海岸防护和热浪适应设施，但项目回报周期长、不确定性高，很难吸引短期资本。这项研究从融资机制切入，提出把碳税、碳市场和基础设施适应投资联动，用持续资金流支持公共资产韧性提升。对结构工程师而言，这说明未来基础设施项目不只需要技术可行性，还要能把风险降低、服务连续性、碳减排和社会收益翻译成投资语言。边界是市场机制设计复杂，若缺少透明治理和绩效审计，容易把适应资金变成低效补贴。
summary.en: Many cities know they need stronger drainage, bridges, coastal protection, and heat-adaptation assets, but the benefits are long dated and uncertain, making them hard to finance with short-term capital. This study approaches the problem through financing, proposing a link between carbon taxes, carbon markets, and infrastructure-adaptation investment to create a continuous funding stream for public-asset resilience. For structural engineers, this means future infrastructure projects need not only technical feasibility, but also the ability to translate risk reduction, service continuity, carbon mitigation, and social benefit into investment language. The boundary is that market design is complex; without transparent governance and performance auditing, adaptation finance can become inefficient subsidy.

caveat.zh: 融资创新不能替代工程优先级排序；最脆弱资产、失效后果和可实施维护路径仍应先被量化。
caveat.en: Financial innovation cannot replace engineering prioritisation; the most vulnerable assets, failure consequences, and feasible maintenance pathways still need to be quantified first.

insights.reference: Li et al., Bridging financial gaps for infrastructure climate adaptation via integrated carbon markets, arXiv:2501.08004

title.zh: 层间位移不是简单挠度：为什么中外抗震审查要同时看漂移、二阶效应和构件延性？
title.en: Storey drift is not ordinary deflection: why seismic review must consider drift, second-order effects, and member ductility together

text.zh: 抗震设计中的层间位移不是普通梁挠度。它描述的是相邻楼层在地震侧移下的相对位移，直接关系到隔墙、幕墙、机电管线、楼梯、门窗以及柱端塑性铰的变形需求。中国、澳洲、美国和欧洲规范都控制层间位移，但逻辑不同：有的强调弹性分析位移乘以放大系数，有的用位移角限值区分多遇地震和罕遇地震，有的把延性等级、重要性系数和二阶效应一起放进稳定审查。跨规范沟通时，不能把 drift ratio 当成静态舒适度指标；它同时是非结构损伤、结构延性和整体稳定的共同语言。
text.en: Storey drift in seismic design is not ordinary beam deflection. It is the relative lateral displacement between adjacent floors under earthquake response, and it directly affects partitions, curtain walls, MEP services, stairs, doors, windows, and plastic hinge deformation demand at column ends. Chinese, Australian, US, and European codes all limit drift, but the logic differs: some amplify elastic analysis displacement; some use drift-ratio limits for frequent and rare earthquakes; some combine ductility class, importance factors, and second-order effects in stability checks. In cross-code communication, drift ratio should not be treated as a static comfort index; it is a shared language for non-structural damage, structural ductility, and global stability.

text.zh: 地震层间位移通常来自弹性分析结果再经放大或折减处理。不同规范对弹性位移、设计位移和验算位移的定义不完全相同，直接比较数值容易误判。
text.en: Seismic storey drift is usually obtained from elastic analysis and then amplified or modified. Codes define elastic, design, and check displacements differently, so direct numerical comparison can be misleading.

text.zh: 当楼层侧移较大时，竖向重力荷载会通过 P-Delta 效应增加倾覆和构件弯矩需求。漂移控制因此不仅是非结构损伤问题，也是整体稳定问题。
text.en: When lateral displacement is large, gravity loads increase overturning and member moment demand through P-Delta effects. Drift control is therefore not only a non-structural damage issue, but also a global stability issue.

text.zh: 延性较高的体系可以通过塑性耗能承受更大变形，但这不等于所有构件和非结构系统都能接受同样漂移。漂移限值必须与构件细部和使用功能一起解释。
text.en: A ductile system can dissipate energy through plastic deformation, but that does not mean all members and non-structural systems can tolerate the same drift. Drift limits must be interpreted together with detailing and occupancy function.

takeaway.zh: 层间位移审查应同时写清楚：位移来自哪种分析、是否乘以位移放大系数、使用哪个限值、是否需要 P-Delta 稳定检查，以及非结构构件是否采用同一漂移限值。跨规范项目最常见的错误，是把一个 drift ratio 数字脱离地震水准、延性假设和二阶效应单独比较。
takeaway.en: A drift review should state the analysis source, whether displacement amplification is applied, which limit is used, whether P-Delta stability must be checked, and whether non-structural components use the same drift limit. The common cross-code error is comparing a single drift-ratio number without the seismic hazard level, ductility assumption, and second-order-effect treatment.

title.zh: 参考实例：弹性位移如何变成设计层间位移？
title.en: Reference example: how does elastic displacement become design storey drift?

intro.zh: 假设某层弹性分析得到相邻楼层位移差为 12 mm，层高为 3.6 m。若体系位移放大系数 Cd 为 5.5，重要性系数 Ie 为 1.0，则美国体系下设计位移不是直接采用 12 mm，而需要进行位移放大。
intro.en: Assume elastic analysis gives a relative displacement of 12 mm between adjacent floors, with a storey height of 3.6 m. If the displacement amplification factor Cd is 5.5 and the importance factor Ie is 1.0, the US framework does not use 12 mm directly; displacement amplification is required.

equations.formula: θ = Px Δ Ie / (Vx hsx Cd)
drift ratio = Δ / h = 66 mm / 3600 mm = 1.83%

formulaTokens.text: drift ratio = Δ / h = 66 mm / 3600 mm = 1.83%

citation.zh: 由 ASCE/SEI 7-22, Sec. 12.8.6 位移放大关系推导；示例仅用于概念筛查，实际限值需按规范表格和结构体系确定。
citation.en: Derived from the displacement-amplification relation in ASCE/SEI 7-22, Sec. 12.8.6; example for conceptual screening only, with actual limits taken from the applicable code table and structural system.

note.zh: 在示例中，12 mm 弹性层间位移被放大为约 66 mm，位移角约 1.83%。这说明抗震漂移审查不能只看分析软件输出的弹性位移；还要说明放大系数、重要性系数、层高、限值来源和 P-Delta 稳定系数是否满足要求。
note.en: In the example, the 12 mm elastic storey displacement is amplified to about 66 mm, giving a drift ratio of about 1.83%. This shows why seismic drift review cannot rely only on elastic displacement output from analysis software; it must state the amplification factor, importance factor, storey height, limit source, and whether the P-Delta stability coefficient is acceptable.

references: Eurocode 8, EN 1998-1, displacement and second-order-effect provisions.
GB 50011 and AS 1170.4 seismic drift and stability review concepts.

referenceLinks.label: ASCE: ASCE/SEI 7-22 Minimum Design Loads and Associated Criteria
